daily_fact: New York City residents are embracing creativity and humor, as seen in the quirky event "Burp Your Apartment," which encourages neighbors to celebrate their unique living spaces together.
topline_md: In recent NYC news, seven cold exposure deaths were reported, a plane crashed into the Hudson River, and PATH service was suspended due to power issues, while Mayor Mamdani faced scrutiny over housing vouchers and announced a lawsuit against predatory tow truck operators.
